title: rubus calotemnus
intro: Rubus calotemnus is a species of bramble that is native to the Himalayan region, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry. It has medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which are rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, and have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus calotemnus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting digestive health and immune function. The plant's herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and tinctures made from its berries, leaves, and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues.
